title: Jess Copper Tools
description: A set of well balanced copper tools and MORE!
body:
This mod adds a set of balanced (and upgradeable) copper tools which make for a great mid game alternative for Iron.

Copper tools are slightly worse than Iron but can be upgraded at anvil with a gold bar to surpass it in enchantability and get closer in other stats.

Additional features:
- 3 new advancements hinting at mod 'progression'
- unique enchantment (obtainable by chance when using any copper tool)
